method: Frontier-model full-project scan (renewal Part 2 step A, first run): web + live GitHub API sweep of the mid-2026 open-source AI landscape against the 8 tracked cohorts and adjacent ones; every candidate below verified against the live GitHub API on 2026-07-02 (star counts as of that day). The scan reported ~50 verified candidates grouped by cohort; the subset persisted here verbatim is what the scan record preserved - the full list is regenerated by the batch-time sweep this manifest's CI pairing rule now enforces.

candidates.note: stars not re-verified in the persisted record

retro_note: RETRO (reconstructable: false): the 19->103 expansion (2026-06-28..07-01) ran with NO frontier manifest - its candidate-pool denominator (who was seen and not admitted) is permanently lost. SCALE-PLAN.md required freezing universe.md v0 before any ingest >19; that file was never created. This manifest series exists so the loss cannot repeat: CI now rejects any seeds.json change without a paired dated frontier manifest.
note: Discovery-frontier denominator (un-backfillable). Candidates are systems CONSIDERED at scan time, not judgments; admission happens via a paired seeds.json change (CI enforces the pairing). Positive-only: no per-system negatives are recorded.
